# components

Shared React Native UI components (pixel art theme).

## Testing

Tests: `__tests__/components/` (Jest + React Native Testing Library)

Use `render`, `screen`, and `fireEvent` from `@testing-library/react-native`. Test visible behavior (rendered text, press events) — not implementation details. Run with `npm run test:components`.

**Note:** Jest config mocks `expo/src/winter/runtime` to avoid Expo 55 lazy-getter conflicts with Jest's module scope — don't remove that mock.
